base_prompt: Objective: Create a square, full-bleed, edge-to-edge Slack profile avatar based on the source photo. Crucial requirement: The final image must be visually cohesive, homogeneous, and completely executed within the specified artistic medium. The subject's face, features, hair, and clothing must be fully translated and rendered into the native textures, linework, color rules, and shading of the requested style (e.g., entirely pixelated for pixel art, pure matte clay textures for claymation, vector paths for vector art, canvas brushstrokes for oil painting). Strictly avoid hybrid results where a photorealistic face is poorly blended or copy-pasted onto an illustrated background. Maintain recognizable facial proportions, bone structure, and likeness from the source photo, but fully stylized into the targeted art form. The artwork and background must extend completely to all four edges of the square canvas without any borders, white margins, or stylized frames. Center the face with natural headroom for high legibility at tiny sizes.
monday: Style: Photographic portrait. Mood: Weary, low-energy Monday morning look, slight shoulder slouch. Holding a ceramic mug with gentle visible coffee steam. Soft cinematic lighting, muted dusty blue and grey color grade, heavily blurred background.
Style: Akira Anime-inspired soft anime illustration. Mood: Sleepy, gentle half-smile. Cozy pastel gloom color palette, background features a rainy window with a soft watercolor blur.
Style: Minimalist ink-and-wash portrait. Mood: Mild reluctance, subtle tired lines under the eyes, clean ink strokes. Monochrome palette with a single muted accent color, stark clean background.

Style: Cinematic dream-core photo. Mood: Half-awake, day-dreaming expression. Soft foggy depth-of-field haze surrounding the subject, heavily desaturated color palette, ethereal out-of-focus background.
Style: Corporate office photography. Mood: Subtle office boredom expression. Sharp cool fluorescent rim lighting, high-contrast shadows, minimalist and deeply blurred office background.
Style: 16-bit pixel art avatar. Mood: Heavy-eyed, sluggish morning posture. Soft neon-blue workspace monitor glow reflecting on the face, minimalist abstract retro grid background.
